label: Schemas, grammars & formal output languages

node.label: Schemas, grammars & formal output languages
node.definition: Schemas, grammars, and formal languages represent allowable structure for JSON, SQL, code, tool calls, plans, or domain records.
node.why_it_matters: They give generators a machine-checkable contract instead of relying solely on prose format instructions.
limitations: Syntactic validity does not ensure semantic correctness, safe values, authorization, or successful execution.
